arguments.argument:
event_inherited() bCanDealDamage=false fingerFrm=0 animSpd=0.15 image_xscale=-1
//Enemy base statistics eName="Advanced Combat Apparatus" eLevel=34 maxLife=11400 life=maxLife atkPower=9 resType[1]=1 resType[2]=2 stunResist=50 bIsBoss=true bNoBonus=true affiliation=7 dieEffect=0 bossProgress=0 activateBoss=0 //-------------------- bossPhase=1 phaseTime=0 moveSpd=1 bChestLight=0 bFloorFlame=1
explodeMissileTime=200 explodeMissileDelay=250 explodeMissileNum=4
laserMouthTime=160 laserMouthDelay=270
laserEyeTime=130 laserEyeDelay=300 laserWarn=0 circleAlpha=0 cirRad=0
skyLaserTime=240 skyLaserDelay=330
bAtkFloorFire=0 atkFloorFireTime=340 atkFloorFireDelay=350
backMissile=0
chestLaserTime=0 hitsDuringLaser=0 bombSpacingA=75 bombSpacingB=100 bombType=0 //--------------------
//Misc Data xCenter=624 yGround=736 roomSpan=352
deathAnim=0
var tXOff; tXOff=-80 for(i=0;i<9;i+=1) { myFloorFire[i]=instance_create(x,y,oCACA_FloorFire) myFloorFire[i].atkPower=atkPower; myFloorFire[i].xOffset=tXOff myFloorFire[i].image_speed=0.3+(0.01*i) tXOff+=20 }
